name: Power of predictive maintenance with IoT: Reducing
snippet:
23 Oct 2024 — Predictive maintenance is proactive machinery maintenance based on real-time data from IoT sensor s to determine when the machinery will break down. Read more
In contrast to reactive (fixing the machine when it breaks down) or preventive (doing maintenance regularly) based maintenance, predictive maintenance is based on IoT and data analytics to anticipate and address problems before they cause costly downtime.
